results.title: Review Reply AI: Paste a Google review, Get 3 professional replies in seconds | Product Hunt
results.content:
Subscribe

Review Reply AI

# Review Reply AI

## Paste a Google review, Get 3 professional replies in seconds

3 followers

## Paste a Google review, Get 3 professional replies in seconds

3 followers

Visit website

Review Reply AI turns one Google review into three ready-to-post reply options for local businesses. Dental clinics, restaurants, salons, hotels, vets — every industry has reviews to answer. Most owners spend 30+ min/week on replies, or don't reply at all. Paste a review, choose industry and tone, get 3 professional replies. No signup for first 5 uses. $19/mo unlimited. Supports 10 industries with multilingual replies.

 Overview
 Reviews
 Team
 More

Free Options

Viktor.com

Viktor.comAn AI coworker that actually does the work

Promoted

Hikaru

📌 [...] Promoted

Hikaru

📌

Hey Product Hunt! 👋 I'm Hikaru, a solo developer in Tokyo. I built Review Reply AI after watching local business owners struggle with Google review responses. The insight was simple: every business owner knows they should reply to reviews, but writing unique, professional responses is tedious. Most end up with "Thank you for your kind words!" on repeat. This tool gives you three distinct options per review — a warm thank-you, a professional response, and an empathetic one. You just pick the best fit and paste it. I'm launching at $19/mo unlimited because I think review management tools are overpriced. The free tier (5/month, no signup) is permanent. Would love your feedback — especially from anyone running a local business!
